title: Underground water pipe leaking on Karol Bagh main road for 10 days
description: A burst underground water pipe near Pusa Road crossing in Karol Bagh has been leaking continuously for 10 days. Thousands of litres of water are being wasted daily. The road surface has become soft and is starting to cave in. DJB complaint registered (Complaint No. DJB2024-00432) but no action taken.
landmark: Near Pusa Road Crossing, Karol Bagh

title: Blocked storm drain flooding Dharavi road every rainfall
description: The storm drain on 90 Feet Road in Dharavi is completely choked with construction debris and solid waste. Every time it rains even moderately, the entire stretch near Transit Camp floods up to 1.5 feet. Residents are unable to reach work. BMC has been informed 3 times but no response.
landmark: 90 Feet Road near Transit Camp, Dharavi

title: Water leaking from overhead tank pipe flooding society compound in Kothrud
description: The PMRDA water supply pipe near Kothrud Depot is visibly cracked and leaking near the junction of Karve Road. Water is accumulating on the road and flowing into Sai Nagar society compound. Residents have reported this to PMC helpline (Call ID PMC-04-2024-7823) 12 days ago but no repair team has visited.
landmark: Karve Road near Kothrud Depot

title: Nala choked near Hazratganj causing sewage overflow on footpath
description: The main drainage nala near Hazratganj market in Lucknow is completely blocked with plastic bags and construction waste. Sewage is overflowing onto the footpath and entering nearby shops. The stench is intolerable. This area sees heavy foot traffic and the situation is a serious health hazard, especially with monsoon approaching.
landmark: Near Hazratganj Market Circle

title: CMWSSB pipe leaking near Adyar signal wasting water continuously
description: A visible crack in the CMWSSB main supply pipeline near Adyar signal (Lattice Bridge Road) has been leaking for over 2 weeks. Water is flowing onto the road creating a slippery surface. A minor accident involving a scooter has already occurred. CMWSSB complaint registered on 18 March but remains unresolved. Complaint ID: CMWSSB-MAR-2024-5510.
landmark: Lattice Bridge Road near Adyar Signal

title: Drainage choked near Kurla station underpass flooding during rains
description: The underpass drainage near Kurla West railway station gets completely choked every monsoon. Floodwater rises up to knee level within 30 minutes of moderate rainfall. Commuters are stranded and local businesses suffer losses. BMC's so-called pre-monsoon cleaning has clearly not happened this year. This has been a recurring problem for 4 years.
landmark: Kurla West Railway Station Underpass

title: Broken water meter flooding footpath in Arera Colony Bhopal
description: A cracked water meter connection box near E-7 Arera Colony main road has been leaking since last Tuesday. Water is pooling on the footpath and seeping into a neighbouring residential plot. The Bhopal Municipal Corporation helpline was called twice. A technician visited but said he did not have the required part and has not returned since.
landmark: E-7 Sector main road, Arera Colony
rejection_reason: On inspection, the meter box is registered under a private housing society. Residents should contact their society maintenance committee for internal plumbing repairs.

title: Storm drain on Koramangala 80 Feet Road blocked causing road flooding
description: The storm drain grate near Koramangala 4th Block on 80 Feet Road is completely blocked with silt and plastic waste. During last week's rain, water accumulated over 1 foot deep on the road for nearly 3 hours. Traffic came to a standstill. BBMP's pre-monsoon drain cleaning drive has clearly not covered this area.
landmark: 80 Feet Road, 4th Block Koramangala

title: KWA pipeline burst near Statue Junction causing water logging
description: A KWA (Kerala Water Authority) supply pipeline near Statue Junction, Thiruvananthapuram has been leaking heavily since Sunday. The leak is at a joint near the Traffic Island. Water is flowing down MG Road and causing waterlogging near the bus stop. Hundreds of commuters are affected daily. KWA complaint filed on 31 March (KWA-TVM-2024-2219).
landmark: Statue Junction Traffic Island, MG Road

title: Blocked drain on MG Road Bengaluru causing stagnant water near metro exit
description: The storm drain near MG Road metro station exit gate 1 is blocked with food waste from nearby eateries. Stagnant water has accumulated and is not draining even 24 hours after rain stopped. The smell and mosquito menace are affecting the footpath used by thousands of daily commuters.
landmark: MG Road Metro Station Gate 1

title: DJB pipeline leaking near Rohini Sector 7 metro station for 2 weeks
description: A DJB water supply pipe near the Rohini Sector 7 metro station has a visible rupture. Water is flowing along the slope toward a nearby residential park and has turned the park's entry path into a muddy swamp. Children cannot use the park. Complaint lodged on DJB website (Ref: DJB-ROH-2024-8821) 14 days ago — no repair yet.
landmark: Near Rohini Sector 7 Metro Station, Delhi

title: Narol-Isanpur Road drainage overflow creating health risk for residents
description: The open drainage channel running alongside Narol-Isanpur Road has overflowed its banks due to blockage by polythene waste. Sewage water is spreading across the road and into residential lanes on both sides. The area has a high density of working-class families. Risk of waterborne disease is high. AMC sanitation van has not been seen in 2 weeks.
landmark: Narol-Isanpur Road near Shani Temple

title: BWSSB pipe burst flooding HSR Layout 27th Main Road
description: A BWSSB main supply pipeline has burst at the junction of 27th Main and 16th Cross, HSR Layout. Water has been gushing since early morning (approx 5 AM) and has been flowing for over 9 hours. An entire lane is submerged. Traffic is diverted. BWSSB emergency number called 3 times — operator says complaint is logged but no crew dispatched yet.
landmark: 27th Main and 16th Cross Junction, HSR Layout

title: Unit-4 storm drain blocked causing flooding in Bhubaneswar residential lane
description: The storm drain on the backside of Unit-4 market, Bhubaneswar, is fully choked with solid waste and silt. Rainwater from the last 2 showers has not drained at all. Three residential lanes behind the market were flooded for hours. Elderly and physically disabled residents were trapped inside their homes. BDA helpdesk has received this complaint (BDA-BBS-2024-0601) with no follow-up.
landmark: Behind Unit-4 Market, Bhubaneswar

title: Cooper Road drain blocked near Khalsa College Amritsar
description: The main drain on Cooper Road near Khalsa College is blocked and sewage is overflowing onto the pavement. The drain has not been cleaned in months. College students are forced to step over sewage water to reach their classrooms. The overflow has damaged the road surface and is accelerating pothole formation in the area.
landmark: Cooper Road near Khalsa College

title: PMC water pipeline leaking under road at Camp area Pune for 18 days
description: A PMC water supply pipeline has been leaking under the road surface on MG Road near Pune Camp for 18 days now. The road is visibly wet even during dry weather and has developed a sinkhole-like depression of about 8 inches. The underground leak is wasting enormous quantities of water. Two PMC teams visited but both said it needs a bigger excavation team. Nothing happened after.
landmark: MG Road near Shree Restaurant, Camp Area

title: Baner Road drain overflow entering residential plots in Baner
description: The roadside drainage on Baner-Pashan Link Road near Orchid Society is blocked by a combination of construction rubble and plastic. Overflow from the drain enters the gate area of at least 3 residential societies. Several homeowners have complained to PMC but were told this is a ward boundary dispute between two zones — and are getting the runaround.
landmark: Baner-Pashan Link Road near Orchid Society
rejection_reason: After field inspection, it was found this drainage line falls under PMRDA jurisdiction, not PMC. Complaint has been forwarded to PMRDA Ward Office. Please re-register with PMRDA for faster resolution.

title: T Nagar drain blocked near Panagal Park causing footpath flooding
description: The roadside drain near Panagal Park in T Nagar is completely choked. After every light shower, the footpath near Saravana Stores gets submerged. Shoppers and pedestrians wade through dirty water. With the shopping district being one of the busiest in Chennai, this drainage failure is completely unacceptable. GCC has received multiple complaints — no action in 3 weeks.
landmark: Near Panagal Park, T Nagar (Saravana Stores stretch)

title: Andheri West water pipeline leak wasting lakhs of litres near SV Road
description: A major BMC water pipeline near SV Road junction in Andheri West has been leaking visibly for 11 days. A consistent stream of water flows down the slope toward Andheri station. BMC's water department has been contacted 4 times. Each time they acknowledge the complaint but no repair team arrives. The amount of water being wasted is criminal given Mumbai's water scarcity.
landmark: SV Road Junction near Andheri West Station

title: Jal Nigam pipeline leaking near Alambagh bus stand for 3 weeks
description: A Jal Nigam Lucknow supply pipeline near the Alambagh UPSRTC bus stand has a joint failure and water is gushing out at the roadside. The constant water flow has eroded the road base and 2 potholes have already formed nearby. Passengers at the bus stand are affected. Jal Nigam complaint number: JNL-LKO-2024-3312 — no follow-up in 21 days.
landmark: Alambagh Bus Stand, Lucknow

title: Drain near Sarojini Nagar market blocked causing footpath waterlogging
description: The covered drain on the eastern side of Sarojini Nagar Market, Delhi is completely silted. After a 20-minute rain, the entire footpath along the market road gets submerged. Shoppers and vendors suffer. The market generates crores in revenue for the area, yet basic drainage maintenance is absent. NDMC has received this complaint with no action in 2 weeks.
landmark: Eastern side road of Sarojini Nagar Market

title: Tambaram main water pipe leaking near railway overbridge for weeks
description: A CMWSSB supply pipe near the Tambaram railway overbridge has been leaking since mid-March. Water is spreading across the service lane and creating a slippery surface for two-wheelers. Local commuters have documented this with photos and video and shared on social media, yet the authority has taken no action. Complaint ID: CMWSSB-CHN-2024-6102.
landmark: Near Tambaram Railway Overbridge, Tambaram

title: WATCO pipeline burst flooding Kalpana Square area Bhubaneswar
description: A WATCO (Water Corporation of Odisha) pipeline near Kalpana Square has burst and water has been flowing for 2 days. A 50-metre stretch of the road is inundated. Vehicles are struggling to pass. Underground erosion has started and the road surface is visibly sinking in one spot. This is a major intersection and the risk of a cave-in is real.
landmark: Kalpana Square Junction, Bhubaneswar

title: Mansarovar drain blocked causing street flooding near Shipra Path
description: The stormwater drain on Shipra Path near Mansarovar bus stand has been choked since the last rain. Dirty water is accumulating on the road and entering the ground floor of two shops. JDA drain cleaning team has not visited in over a month. This is a high-footfall area. Residents are extremely frustrated by the inaction.
landmark: Shipra Path near Mansarovar Bus Stand, Jaipur

title: Ranjit Avenue water supply pipe leaking damaging road surface Amritsar
description: A water supply pipe under Ranjit Avenue, Amritsar near the hotel strip has a crack that has been leaking for 2 weeks. The road surface has developed a sinkhole in the slow lane. Hotels in the area have complained that water pressure in their supply has dropped. AMRDA has been informed — no response for 14 days.
landmark: Ranjit Avenue Hotel Strip, Amritsar

title: Mehdipatnam underpass drain choked causing 2-foot flooding every rain
description: The drainage at Mehdipatnam underpass is blocked with years of accumulated silt and polythene. Every moderate rain leads to 2 feet of flooding inside the underpass for hours. Vehicles get stuck. An ambulance was reportedly delayed last week due to this flooding. GHMC has been submitting 'resolved' status on old complaints without actually fixing the drain.
landmark: Mehdipatnam Underpass, Hyderabad

title: BWSSB pipe leaking on Old Airport Road near Domlur flyover
description: A BWSSB pipeline on Old Airport Road near the Domlur flyover footing has been seeping water for over 10 days. Water is pooling under the flyover creating a slippery black-algae patch on the road surface that is dangerous for two-wheelers. BWSSB helpline (1916) acknowledged the complaint 8 days ago — no crew has visited.
landmark: Near Domlur Flyover footing, Old Airport Road

title: Pitampura water line burst flooding residential lane near TV Tower
description: A DJB water supply pipe near the TV Tower in Pitampura burst 3 days ago. An entire residential lane — B Block Pitampura — is flooded with 4–6 inches of water. Residents cannot park their vehicles or take out their children. DJB emergency team was supposed to arrive within 24 hours. It has been 72 hours. Complaint Ref: DJB-PIT-2024-9120.
landmark: B Block near TV Tower, Pitampura

title: Banjara Hills Road No. 12 drain overflowing into residential compound
description: The roadside drain on Banjara Hills Road No. 12 near the Taj Krishna junction has overflowed into a residential compound. The overflow contains sewage mixed with rainwater. One family's ground floor has been damaged. GHMC field team visited but said they need a 'JCB order' which has not come in 2 weeks. This drain has never been desiltated in the last 2 years per local residents.
landmark: Road No. 12 near Taj Krishna Junction, Banjara Hills

title: PHED pipe leaking near Vaishali Nagar underpass Jaipur wasting water daily
description: A PHED water pipeline near the Vaishali Nagar underpass has been leaking from a joint for 2 weeks. Water is flowing down the underpass approach road and into the storm drain. PHED Jaipur Division office was visited in person and a complaint was filed (PHED-JDN-2024-7743). No repair has been done. Residents have shared video of the leak on WhatsApp groups extensively.
landmark: Vaishali Nagar Underpass, Jaipur

title: Rajajinagar 4th Block drain blocked causing sewage smell in residential area
description: The drain running behind the main road of Rajajinagar 4th Block is completely silted and not flowing. Sewage is backing up and the smell is entering homes on both sides of the lane. Residents in the area include several families with young children and elderly. BBMP has received multiple complaints since January — zero action taken.
landmark: 4th Block Main Road, Rajajinagar

title: Borivali West MCGM water pipe burst near railway station entrance
description: An MCGM water main has ruptured near the Borivali West railway station main entrance. Water is flooding the approach road to the station used by lakhs of commuters daily. The burst happened at 4 AM and by 9 AM the road was ankle-deep in water. Trains are on time but commuters can't reach them without getting drenched. MCGM 1916 helpline is giving busy signals.
landmark: Near Borivali West Railway Station Entrance

title: Yelahanka water supply pipe leaking near Air Force campus road
description: A BWSSB supply line near the Air Force Station road in Yelahanka has been leaking from a joint for over 3 weeks. The leaked water is flowing into an adjacent agricultural field. The land owner has complained both to BWSSB and to the BBMP ward office. BWSSB says it is an old asbestos pipe that needs a full section replacement — but no work order has been issued.
landmark: Near Air Force Station Road, Yelahanka

title: Perambur sewage drain choked causing overflow into residential lane
description: The main sewage drain on Perambur Barracks Road near the old textile mill area is choked and has been overflowing for 8 days. Sewage water is entering two small lanes used by about 40 families. One elderly resident slipped and fell in the overflow water last week. CMDA and GCC are pointing fingers at each other for jurisdiction. Families are desperate.
landmark: Perambur Barracks Road near Old Textile Mill

title: Janakpuri B block DJB tap connection leaking flooding lane for 5 days
description: A DJB public tap connection pipe in Janakpuri B block market area has been leaking at the joint near the meter box. Water is flowing continuously down the lane slope. Shopkeepers have placed sandbags to divert flow. DJB received complaint (DJB-JAN-2024-6680) 5 days ago — a plumber came, looked, and left without fixing saying he needs a spare part that would be arranged. Never came back.
landmark: B Block Market, Janakpuri
